subject.description: South Asian male, early 30s, short dark hair, wearing a plain white t-shirt. Eyes mid-blink caught between closed and open — the exhaustion blink, not the alert blink. Chin slightly dropped toward chest. Shoulders rounded forward. Skin pores on forehead visible, slight five o'clock shadow. Photographically real — NOT illustrated or rendered.
subject.action: Sitting, head slightly bowed, one hand pressing two fingers against his temple — the specific physical gesture of someone processing that everything they believed was wrong.

setting.location: Integrated into a bold graphic design composition. The person sits real and photographic within a designed layout. Behind and around him: two large bold vertical columns. LEFT COLUMN: massive geometric sans-serif header 'WHAT GOOGLE SAID' on deep green background — mock metric blocks showing 4.2x ROAS, 847 conversions, green upward arrows, clean authoritative official-looking numbers. RIGHT COLUMN: same bold type header 'WHAT ACTUALLY HAPPENED' on deep red-black background — starkly different numbers: 1.1x ROAS, 31 real conversions, a flat-line graph. The person's head and shoulders emerge from the bottom center of the layout, positioned between the two columns, looking down.
setting.time_of_day: N/A — graphic design composition with integrated photography

composition.camera_angle: Slightly high angle on the subject — subject feels small beneath the weight of the data above him
composition.framing: Close-up on subject. Crown with headspace. Cut at base of neck. Subject occupies lower third of the overall composition — the graphic design fills the upper two-thirds. This creates a visual hierarchy: data at top, human consequence at bottom.

lighting.type: Clean directional light on the subject from slightly above left — soft but real, not studio-flat. The graphic design elements are self-illuminated flat color.
lighting.color_grading: Subject: cinematic teal-orange grade, warm protected skin tones, pores visible. Graphic design: LEFT column is corporate green, RIGHT column is deep near-black with red accent. High contrast between the photographic warmth of the human face and the flat graphic coldness of the data columns above.

mood: The weight of discovering you've been wrong — not explosive, but crushing and slow. The human face is the emotional anchor in a composition of cold data.
aesthetic_style: Hybrid composition: photographically real human integrated into bold geometric graphic design. Human element shot on Sony A7, 80mm, f/2.8 — hyper-realistic skin texture, real pores, genuine exhausted expression. Surrounding graphic design is bold, high-contrast, typographically strong. The tension between real photography and flat design IS the visual concept.
